headline: What co-locating AI data centers may mean for your energy bills
summary: NRG Energy (NRG) CEO Larry Coben speaks with Yahoo Finance Anchor Julie Hyman at the CERAWeek 2026 conference about the energy demand of AI data center projects, how it may materialize in Americans' electricity and utility bills, and the impact that Bring Your Own Battery (BYOB) programs may have on AI-grid capacities.
